name: Custom Safety Posters & Placards
shortDescription: Printed workplace safety reminders — PPE, hygiene, hazard and 'Safety First' placards.
longDescription: Beyond statutory signage, workplaces run better with visible day-to-day reminders — PPE requirements at an area's entrance, handwashing and hygiene posters near washrooms, 'report all accidents' and general safety-culture placards in break areas. We print these to order in your choice of wording, size and finish, matched to the areas and hazards specific to your site rather than a generic off-the-shelf design.

images.alt: Custom Safety Posters & Placards supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Formats
specs.value: A4 to A1 poster, or rigid placard

specs.label: Topics
specs.value: PPE reminders, hygiene/handwashing, general safety culture, housekeeping

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Laminated paper, PVC foam, or rigid sheet

specs.label: Production
specs.value: Custom wording and layout to order
